news.title:
Nifty trades rangebound today, with Reliance Industries acting as a drag.
Railway stocks present a significant opportunity, according to ET Now.
news.summary:
Nifty trades rangebound today, with Reliance Industries acting as a drag.
Railway stocks present a significant opportunity, according to ET Now.

news.title:
Reliance Industries fell 4%, hitting a 10-month low of ₹1,300.2, with m-cap dropping below ₹18 trillion.
Analysts cite export duties, rising costs, and LPG production shifts as factors pressuring near-term margins.
news.summary:
Reliance Industries fell 4%, hitting a 10-month low of ₹1,300.2, with m-cap dropping below ₹18 trillion.
Analysts cite export duties, rising costs, and LPG production shifts as factors pressuring near-term margins.

news.title:
Sensex drops as Reliance shares fall nearly 4%.
Nifty declines over 100 points amid Reliance's downturn.
news.summary:
Sensex drops as Reliance shares fall nearly 4%.
Nifty declines over 100 points amid Reliance's downturn.

news.title:
Six of India's top 10 firms lost ₹65k cr in market value, Airtel hit most, losing ₹29,993 cr.
Broader market struggled on global, domestic issues; Reliance Industries retained top valuation at ₹18.28 lakh cr.
news.summary:
Six of India's top 10 firms lost ₹65k cr in market value, Airtel hit most, losing ₹29,993 cr.
Broader market struggled on global, domestic issues; Reliance Industries retained top valuation at ₹18.28 lakh cr.

news.title:
FMCGs like Reliance Retail, Emami, and Dabur tap Ayurveda startups to boost growth.
National players focus on regional and niche Ayurvedic brands amid market slowdown.
news.summary:
FMCGs like Reliance Retail, Emami, and Dabur tap Ayurveda startups to boost growth.
National players focus on regional and niche Ayurvedic brands amid market slowdown.

news.title:
Petroleum and food products removed from concessional SEZ scheme, impacting incentives.
Reliance Industries may face potential effects due to this policy change.
news.summary:
Petroleum and food products removed from concessional SEZ scheme, impacting incentives.
Reliance Industries may face potential effects due to this policy change.

news.title:
Nomura warns OMCs like IOCL, BPCL, and HPCL face margin pressure from ATF, LPG price hikes, and subsidy burdens.
Petronet LNG expands capacity to 22.5 mtpa; RIL's SEZ refinery exempted from windfall tax, aiding margins.
news.summary:
Nomura warns OMCs like IOCL, BPCL, and HPCL face margin pressure from ATF, LPG price hikes, and subsidy burdens.
Petronet LNG expands capacity to 22.5 mtpa; RIL's SEZ refinery exempted from windfall tax, aiding margins.

news.title:
Sathlokhar Synergys wins Rs. 102.7 Cr Reliance contract for Andhra plant, with total order wins of Rs. 125.1 Cr.
Shares rose 8.8% to Rs. 336.8; total FY26 order intake now Rs. 1,097 Cr, 2.7x FY25 revenue.
news.summary:
Sathlokhar Synergys wins Rs. 102.7 Cr Reliance contract for Andhra plant, with total order wins of Rs. 125.1 Cr.
Shares rose 8.8% to Rs. 336.8; total FY26 order intake now Rs. 1,097 Cr, 2.7x FY25 revenue.

news.title:
Bharti Airtel added 48.5 lakh wireless subscribers in Feb 2026, leading growth for 3rd straight month.
Reliance Jio gained 17.4 lakh subscribers, while BSNL and MTNL continued subscriber losses.
news.summary:
Bharti Airtel added 48.5 lakh wireless subscribers in Feb 2026, leading growth for 3rd straight month.
Reliance Jio gained 17.4 lakh subscribers, while BSNL and MTNL continued subscriber losses.

news.title:
Bharti Airtel and Reliance partner with PE firms, hyperscalers to expand data centers.
This move aids scaling in high-growth areas while protecting shareholders from capital calls.
news.summary:
Bharti Airtel and Reliance partner with PE firms, hyperscalers to expand data centers.
This move aids scaling in high-growth areas while protecting shareholders from capital calls.

news.title:
India's diesel exports to SE Asia hit a 7-year high in March.
Higher profits in Asia amid U.S.-Israel-Iran war boosted exports by Reliance Industries.
news.summary:
India's diesel exports to SE Asia hit a 7-year high in March.
Higher profits in Asia amid U.S.-Israel-Iran war boosted exports by Reliance Industries.

news.title:
Reliance Industries received a penalty of Rs. 15.4L under GST for incorrect input tax credit.
The company plans to appeal the order; no operational or activity impact reported.
news.summary:
Reliance Industries received a penalty of Rs. 15.4L under GST for incorrect input tax credit.
The company plans to appeal the order; no operational or activity impact reported.

news.title:
India's fuel exports to Europe, its third-largest market, crashed in March.
Decline linked to EU regulations and wars in Europe and West Asia.
news.summary:
India's fuel exports to Europe, its third-largest market, crashed in March.
Decline linked to EU regulations and wars in Europe and West Asia.

news.title:
RIL to SBI 'Magnificent 7' stocks lose ₹3.28 lakh crore as Nifty drops 4%. Escalating Middle East war spooks investors.
RIL hit hardest, losing ₹87,690 crore due to windfall tax. SBI, HDFC Bank lose ₹70,000+ crore each amid oil price fears.
news.summary:
RIL to SBI 'Magnificent 7' stocks lose ₹3.28 lakh crore as Nifty drops 4%. Escalating Middle East war spooks investors.
RIL hit hardest, losing ₹87,690 crore due to windfall tax. SBI, HDFC Bank lose ₹70,000+ crore each amid oil price fears.

news.title: Reliance shares recover nearly 2% from their lowest point.
news.summary: Reliance shares recover nearly 2% from their lowest point.

news.title:
Export tax on diesel, jet fuel not applicable to Reliance's SEZ refinery.
India government exempts Reliance Industries' SEZ refinery from export tax.
news.summary:
Export tax on diesel, jet fuel not applicable to Reliance's SEZ refinery.
India government exempts Reliance Industries' SEZ refinery from export tax.

news.title:
Reliance Industries faced a 5% decline Friday, its steepest in 2 years.
Reliance's market cap now stands at ₹18.24T ($192B).
news.summary:
Reliance Industries faced a 5% decline Friday, its steepest in 2 years.
Reliance's market cap now stands at ₹18.24T ($192B).

news.title:
Mcap of 7 top firms fell by ₹1.75 trn; Reliance lost ₹89,720.3 cr, HDFC Bank ₹37,248.6 cr.
L&T, Bajaj Finance, Infosys gained; geopolitical tensions drove market volatility, Sensex fell 1.3%.
news.summary:
Mcap of 7 top firms fell by ₹1.75 trn; Reliance lost ₹89,720.3 cr, HDFC Bank ₹37,248.6 cr.
L&T, Bajaj Finance, Infosys gained; geopolitical tensions drove market volatility, Sensex fell 1.3%.

news.title:
Clarity on export windfall taxes for Reliance SEZ refinery is crucial post fuel tax changes.
Uncertainty impacts refining margins and government revenues, say analysts.
news.summary:
Clarity on export windfall taxes for Reliance SEZ refinery is crucial post fuel tax changes.
Uncertainty impacts refining margins and government revenues, say analysts.

news.title:
Nifty fell 490 points on Friday, ending at 22,800, marking its fifth straight weekly loss.
Weak global cues, rupee's record low, higher bond yields, and heavyweights RIL & HDFC Bank dragged markets.
news.summary:
Nifty fell 490 points on Friday, ending at 22,800, marking its fifth straight weekly loss.
Weak global cues, rupee's record low, higher bond yields, and heavyweights RIL & HDFC Bank dragged markets.
